title: Recorded Future Domain Intelligence
content:
Domain enrichment using Recorded Future intelligence

Cortex XSOAR/XSIAM SOAR playbook from the Recorded Future pack (RecordedFuture, partner-supported).

Inputs — Domain: The domain name to enrich..

Outputs — DBotScore.Indicator: The indicator that was tested; DBotScore.Type: Indicator type; DBotScore.Vendor: Vendor used to calculate the score; DBotScore.Score: The actual score; Domain.Name: Domain name; RecordedFuture.Domain.criticality: Risk Criticality; RecordedFuture.Domain.criticalityLabel: Risk Criticality Label; RecordedFuture.Domain.riskString: Risk String; RecordedFuture.Domain.riskSummary: Risk Summary; RecordedFuture.Domain.rules: Risk Rules.

Integrations/scripts used: Recorded Future v2.
raw_yaml:
id: Recorded Future Domain Intelligence
version: -1
name: Recorded Future Domain Intelligence
description: Domain enrichment using Recorded Future intelligence
starttaskid: "0"
tasks:
  "0":
    id: "0"
    taskid: f4b60c32-9586-439f-800c-c8cb71ee5589
    type: start
    task:
      id: f4b60c32-9586-439f-800c-c8cb71ee5589
      version: -1
      name: ""
      iscommand: false
      brand: ""
      description: ''
    nexttasks:
      '#none#':
      - "16"
    separatecontext: false
    view: |-
      {
        "position": {
          "x": 50,
          "y": 50
        }
      }
    note: false
    timertriggers: []
    ignoreworker: false
    skipunavailable: false
    quietmode: 0
  "16":
    id: "16"
    taskid: 85412671-162b-4f6f-8aa9-3cbabe89098e
    type: condition
    task:
      id: 85412671-162b-4f6f-8aa9-3cbabe89098e
      version: -1
      name: Is there a domain to enrich?
      description: Checks whether the playbook's input contains at least one domain
        name to enrich.
      type: condition
      iscommand: false
      brand: ""
    nexttasks:
      '#default#':
      - "24"
      "yes":
      - "29"
    separatecontext: false
    conditions:
    - label: "yes"
      condition:
      - - operator: isExists
          left:
            value:
              simple: inputs.Domain
            iscontext: true
    view: |-
      {
        "position": {
          "x": 50,
          "y": 195
        }
      }
    note: false
    timertriggers: []
    ignoreworker: false
    skipunavailable: false
    quietmode: 0
  "24":
    id: "24"
    taskid: 5c25e685-6692-4d66-828f-4cbc4264844c
    type: title
    task:
      id: 5c25e685-6692-4d66-828f-4cbc4264844c
      version: -1
      name: Done
      type: title
      iscommand: false
      brand: ""
      description: ''
    separatecontext: false
    view: |-
      {
        "position": {
          "x": 50,
          "y": 1045

      }
    note: false
    timertriggers: []
    ignoreworker: false
    skipunavailable: false
    quietmode: 0
  "26":
    id: "26"
    taskid: a19c274b-c50c-498c-8ad7-b352e8cf6c08
    type: condition
    task:
      id: a19c274b-c50c-498c-8ad7-b352e8cf6c08
      version: -1
      name: Is Recorded Future API enabled?
      description: Checks if there is an active instance of the Recorded Future API
        integration enabled.
      type: condition
      iscommand: false
      brand: ""
    nexttasks:
      '#default#':
      - "24"
      "yes":
      - "28"
    separatecontext: false
    conditions:
    - label: "yes"
      condition:
      - - operator: isExists
          left:
            value:
              complex:
                root: modules
                filters:
                - - operator: containsString
                    left:
                      value:
                        simple: modules.brand
                      iscontext: true
                    right:
                      value:
                        simple: Recorded Future v2
                    ignorecase: true
                - - operator: isEqualString
                    left:
                      value:
                        simple: modules.state
                      iscontext: true
                    right:
                      value:
                        simple: active
                    ignorecase: true
                accessor: brand
            iscontext: true
    view: |-
      {
        "position": {
          "x": 410,
          "y": 505
        }
      }
    note: false
    timertriggers: []
    ignoreworker: false
    skipunavailable: false
    quietmode: 0
  "28":
    id: "28"
    taskid: ee31f6ce-5751-4049-85a3-d3fc1b55eaf1
    type: regular
    task:
      id: ee31f6ce-5751-4049-85a3-d3fc1b55eaf1
      version: -1
      name: Get domain intelligence from Recorded Future
      description: Get threat intelligence for an IP, domain, CVE, URL or file.
      script: Recorded Future v2|||recordedfuture-intelligence
      type: regular
      iscommand: true
      brand: Recorded Future v2
    nexttasks:
      '#none#':
      - "30"
    scriptarguments:
      entity:
        simple: ${inputs.Domain}
      entity_type:
        simple: domain
      fetch_related_entities:
        simple: "yes"
      fetch_riskyCIDRips:
        simple: "no"
    reputationcalc: 1
    separatecontext: false
    view: |-
      {
        "position": {
          "x": 410,
          "y": 730
        }
      }
    note: false
    timertriggers: []
    ignoreworker: false
    skipunavailable: false
    quietmode: 0
  "29":
    id: "29"
    taskid: 4b34cf28-ad8f-4788-8080-5c751c6642eb
    type: title
    task:
      id: 4b34cf28-ad8f-4788-8080-5c751c6642eb
      version: -1
      name: Enrich Using Recorded Future API
      type: title
      iscommand: false
      brand: ""
      description: ''
    nexttasks:
      '#none#':
      - "26"
    separatecontext: false
    view: |-
      {
        "position": {
          "x": 410,
          "y": 370
        }
      }
    note: false
    timertriggers: []
    ignoreworker: false
    skipunavailable: false
    quietmode: 0
  "30":
    id: "30"
    taskid: 3e1b7c13-3ace-4ad2-81f2-18fc6e425eb5
    type: regular
    task:
      id: 3e1b7c13-3ace-4ad2-81f2-18fc6e425eb5
      version: -1
      name: setIndicator
      description: Change the properties of an indicator
      script: Builtin|||setIndicator
      type: regular
      iscommand: true
      brand: Builtin
    nexttasks:
      '#none#':
      - "24"
    scriptarguments:
      recordedfutureriskrules:
        simple: ${RecordedFuture.Domain.concatRules}
      value:
        simple: ${inputs.Domain}
    separatecontext: false
    view: |-
      {
        "position": {
          "x": 410,
          "y": 870
        }
      }
    note: false
    timertriggers: []
    ignoreworker: false
    skipunavailable: false
    quietmode: 0
view: |-
  {
    "linkLabelsPosition": {
      "16_24_#default#": 0.57,
      "26_24_#default#": 0.55,

  value:

      root: Domain
      accessor: Name
  required: false
  description: The domain name to enrich.
  playbookInputQuery:
